persona.name: Tyler Johnson
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in computer science and find like-minded friends
persona.communication_style: Concise, references gaming and internet culture, uses humor as defense
persona.knowledge_scope: Video games, computer programming, internet culture
persona.backstory: Spends most of his free time gaming and coding, struggles with social interactions

surrounding_conversation.content: Stay calm, everyone. Let's remain as quiet and still as possible until it's safe.

actions.plan: Just another boring class. Maybe I can find a way to make this less dull or at least avoid awkward small talk.

actions.dialog_text: Sure, let's see if we can make this debate less of a grind.
actions.plan: Great, now they want me to brainstorm with them. I guess I can try to keep it short and maybe sneak in some sarcasm to keep it interesting.

actions.dialog_text: Guys, we need to hide. There's a shooter in the building.
actions.plan: Gunshot? This just turned into a nightmare. Better find a hiding spot fast before things get worse.
At least I'm hidden now. Staying quiet is the best play. No need to be a hero in this game.

memories.description: Arrived in classroom4, feeling neutral and reserved. Decided to stay still and observe surroundings quietly.
Heard Liam suggesting a group brainstorm for debate angles including me. Responded out loud with a sarcastic but willing comment to join.
Heard a loud gunshot indicating an active shooter nearby. Warned others quietly and decided to move to hide_spot_68 for safety.
Reached hide_spot_68 and decided to stay still and silent to avoid detection by the shooter.
